name: Infernal Servitor

effects.text: Infernal Servitor can perform actions the turn it is recruited.
Remove it from the game if you control no infernal vampires, or after it performs a successful action.
Infernal Servitor can perform actions the turn it is recruited.
Remove it from the game if you control no infernal vampires, or after it performs a successful action.
Infernal Servitor can play cards requiring basic Daimoinon and/or basic Obfuscate as a vampire.

notes: Ally: act same turn, remove if no infernal. [DAI] can use basic dai/obf.
text:
Unique demon with 2 life. 1 strength, 3 bleed. Requires an infernal vampire.
[dai] Infernal Servitor can perform actions the turn it is recruited. Remove it from the game if you control no infernal vampires, or after it performs a successful action.
[DAI] As above, and Infernal Servitor can play cards requiring basic Daimoinon [dai] and/or basic Obfuscate [obf] as a vampire.
